author: nancymarinelli
body:
The EB TP Et saturation  value has been changed from 2 TeV to 500 GeV upon lasting agreement with Egamma L1 team. Changes were necessary in DataFormats/EcalDigi/interface/EcalEBPhase2TriggerPrimitiveSample.h and related and all files committed here. Also the SimCalorimetry/EcalEBTrigPrimProducers/test/testPhase2_15_0_0.py -> SimCalorimetry/EcalEBTrigPrimProducers/test/testPhase2_17_x_y.py has been updated to work with CMSSW_17_x_y

#### PR description:
The change in the output will be the TP Et saturation energy as described above. No changes in the data size are expected. 
This PR goes hand-in-hand with PR 3 in https://github.com/cms-data/SimCalorimetry-EcalEBTrigPrimProducers submitted (sorry) about year ago. 

This PR has been validated locally in EB for quite some time. We will add slides soon, after we put together the new  results in CMSSW17 which just confrim older ones  
 

#### PR validation:

The most recent validation of this  PR has been executed  on electron gun samples with Et  50, 100, 200 and 500  GeV in a restricted eta/phi region corresponding to one of the future BACKEND card for the EB Phase 2. The validation is satisfactory. It can be extend to the whole EB ( in fact is on the way) but would not change the PR ( as far as we can tell now). 
All tests have been carried out, as in the recent and far-ther past, with our .cfg ( which is available in this PR in /afs/cern.ch/work/n/nancy/private/EcalL1/workTPHPhaseII/workWithNewDigis/UpdateSaturationEnergy/CMSSW_17_0_0_pre1/src/SimCalorimetry/EcalEBTrigPrimProducers/test/testPhase2_17_x_y.py

The simulation we make is up to DIGI, because, as we speak and unless I am very wrong, there is no full digi+reco chaine for EB in Phase 2. However, all which is up to DIGI can well be included in the central workflow, as asked repedeatly since the whole era modifier are included in the release. 
We kept going with out .py which is very efficient. The same era modifiers are in release and can be used centrally any time

title: TP  Et staturation energy changed from 2 TeV to 500 GeV
